Order of the Stone - Mac Application
=====================================

INSTALLATION:
1. Double-click "Order of the Stone.app" to run the game
2. No additional installation required - all assets are bundled!

SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS:
- macOS 10.14 or later
- 27MB free disk space

CONTROLS:
- WASD or Arrow Keys: Move
- Space: Jump
- Left Click: Attack/Place blocks
- Right Click: Break blocks
- F3: Toggle debug screen
- ESC: Pause menu

FEATURES:
- Infinite world exploration
- Block building and mining
- Combat system with sword throwing
- Save/load system
- Multiple character skins
- F3 debug information

TROUBLESHOOTING:
If the game doesn't start, try:
1. Right-click the app and select "Open"
2. Check System Preferences > Security & Privacy
3. Make sure you have macOS 10.14 or later

Created by Team Banana Labs Studios
Version: 1.0
